args.code: (() => { const keys = Object.keys(window).filter(k => k.toLowerCase().includes("game") || k.toLowerCase().includes("state") || k.toLowerCase().includes("farm") || k.toLowerCase().includes("save") || k.toLowerCase().includes("data")); if (typeof gameState !== "undefined") return JSON.stringify({source: "gameState", data: gameState}); if (typeof saveData !== "undefined") return JSON.stringify({source: "saveData", data: saveData}); if (typeof playerData !== "undefined") return JSON.stringify({source: "playerData", data: playerData}); return JSON.stringify({foundKeys: keys}); })()
